home.heroSubtitle: Master the Solana ecosystem. Learn crypto terminology, DeFi, NFTs, and staking — from beginner to expert, all in one place.
home.featSub: From market data to deep education, from glossary to community — everything you need is here.
home.feat1Desc: Real-time SOL price, market cap, volume updates. Full Solana ecosystem overview.
home.feat2Desc: From blockchain basics to DeFi operations. Three-level learning path, step by step.
home.feat3Desc: 200+ crypto terms explained. From HODL to Proof-of-History, never feel lost again.
home.feat4Desc: Daily curated Solana ecosystem updates, project progress, and protocol changes.
home.feat5Desc: Connect with global Solana users. Share experiences, ask questions, grow together.
home.feat6Desc: Wallet creation, DEX usage, staking operations — hands-on guides for safe participation.
home.pathSub: Whether you're a complete beginner or want to dive deep into DeFi/development, we have content for you.
home.level1Desc: What is blockchain? What is cryptocurrency? Why Solana? From zero knowledge to creating your first wallet.
home.level2Desc: Deep dive into DeFi, NFTs, Staking, Meme Coins. Understand every important sector of the Solana ecosystem.
home.level3Desc: Liquidity mining, on-chain data analysis, Solana program development. Become a true ecosystem participant.
home.glossSub: 200+ common crypto terms explained, helping you navigate the blockchain world with confidence.
home.gp1: Solana's unique timestamping mechanism that allows nodes to verify event ordering without communication — the core of Solana's performance.
home.gp2: Decentralized finance. Financial services like lending, trading, and staking via smart contracts, without banks or intermediaries.
home.gp3: "Hold On for Dear Life" — holding cryptocurrency long-term regardless of short-term price fluctuations.
home.gp4: Delegating SOL to validators to secure the network while earning ~6-8% annual rewards.
home.gp5: Transaction fee for on-chain operations. Solana's gas fees are extremely low, typically under $0.001.
home.gp6: Non-Fungible Token. Each token is unique, used for digital art, game items, memberships, and more.
home.newsSub: Daily curated Solana project news and market updates.
home.news1: Solana Alpenglow: Latency could drop from 13 seconds to 0.1 seconds
home.news2: Jupiter DEX monthly volume surpasses $30 billion, becoming the largest on-chain DEX
home.news3: Multiple asset managers file for Solana ETF, Chinese investor interest surges
home.commSub: Ask questions in Discord, share insights in the forum, participate in weekly events, and grow with the most active community.

start.title: Get Started with Solana
start.description: Everything you need to begin your Solana learning journey.
start.heroSubtitle: Solana is a high-performance blockchain known for fast transactions and low fees. Whether you're curious about crypto or ready to explore decentralized apps, this guide will walk you through the basics in about 10 minutes.
start.prereq3: No wallet, money, or technical skills required
start.step1Desc: Understand what Solana is, how it works, and why it matters.
start.step2Desc: Get familiar with wallets, tokens, staking, and other core concepts.
start.step3Desc: Apply your knowledge with guided lessons and real-world examples.
